verdict.rationale: The claim's EUR 12.849m matches the preliminary v1 finance pack, but v1 is explicitly marked 'superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2', whose final restated Q2 2026 actual gross profit is EUR 13.032m. The claim agrees with a stale, superseded figure rather than the current authoritative value.
verdict.suggested_action: Update the master document to the final restated gross profit of EUR 13.032m from Finance Pack v2.

evidence.span_text: Gross profit 12.849 (Q2 2026 actual) ... PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2.
